reject_unstructured: HVPS+ market practice: unstructured addresses are rejected from 14 November 2026.
mandatory_country: HVPS+ market practice: Country is mandatory.
mandatory_town: HVPS+ market practice: Town Name is required.
structured_only: HVPS+ market practice: fully structured addresses are required; residual AdrLine is disallowed.
non_iso_country: ISO 3166-1: Country must be a valid alpha-2 code.
adrline_overflow: ISO 20022: AdrLine is limited to seven lines of 70 characters.
structured_overflow: ISO 20022 PostalAddress27: structured elements have fixed maximum lengths.
